items.title: This is like knowing you have to be prepared for a hurricane coming and you’re watching everyone else hit the grocery store while you wait and see. I hope the shelves aren’t too empty when the storm arrives.
items.author: Kerith Burke
items.body_excerpt: This is like knowing you have to be prepared for a hurricane coming and you’re watching everyone else hit the grocery store while you wait and see. I hope the shelves aren’t too empty when the storm arrives.

images.alt: The angst from some portions of the Golden State Warriors' fan base about different free agents coming off the board right now is comical. If you have the chance to land LeBron James — you wait to see what he decides. If he doesn't sign in the Bay, then you look elsewhere and figure it out.

items.title: Random POTD Jamie Feick. Undrafted PF from Michigan St could board. Earned his way to NBA on hustle in 96. Bounced around SA, CHA + MIL til he stuck in NJ grabbing nearly 10 rpg in 99-00. Got a big contract in 00 and immediately got hurt, effectively retired in 01.

Jaylen Brown just did a Twitch stream. Said he was still processing the trade, called VJ Edgecombe and Tyrese Maxey (both picked up), said he was looking forward to meeting AI (and professed his love for the black jerseys) and said… 

“The Process is back, motherfuckers.”

The Rockets like to do flat and descending structured contracts. I'll project Tari Eason with a $19 million starting salary until we get confirmation, which is the highest they could give him with these terms.

They'd have enough room to add two minimums under the second apron.
